testcase.name: runScenario["Dismiss login popup on the homepage", "Flipkart Homepage Login Popup"](1)

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (439d0e50fb11a01ae639431a20e47349)] -> xpath: //input[@class= 'nw1UBF v1zwn25']] (tried for 10 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.40.0', revision: 'b3333f1' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.56, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.57 (b4f28b5637d0..., userDataDir: C:\Users\tejas\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:50852}, goog:processID: 12812, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:50852/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.56, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 439d0e50fb11a01ae639431a20e47349

testcase.system-out:
Scenario Outline: Dismiss login popup on the homepage # classpath:features/Popup_Dismiss.feature:15
Scenario Outline: Dismiss login popup on the homepage # classpath:features/Popup_Dismiss.feature:14 ✔ Given I access the Flipkart homepage as a non-logged-in user # stepdefinitions.Popup_Dismiss.i_access_the_flipkart_homepage_as_a_non_logged_in_user() ✔ Given I access the Flipkart homepage as a non-logged-in user # stepdefinitions.Popup_Dismiss.i_access_the_flipkart_homepage_as_a_non_logged_in_user() ✔ And a login popup is displayed # stepdefinitions.Popup_Dismiss.a_login_popup_is_displayed() ✔ When I click on the close button of the popup # stepdefinitions.Popup_Dismiss.i_click_on_the_close_button_of_the_popup() ✔ And the login popup should be dismissed # stepdefinitions.Popup_Dismiss.the_login_popup_should_be_dismissed() ✔ And a login popup is displayed # stepdefinitions.Popup_Dismiss.a_login_popup_is_displayed() ✔ When I click on the close button of the popup # stepdefinitions.Popup_Dismiss.i_click_on_the_close_button_of_the_popup() ✔ And the login popup should be dismissed # stepdefinitions.Popup_Dismiss.the_login_popup_should_be_dismissed() ✔ And I should be able to interact with the homepage without any obstruction # stepdefinitions.Popup_Dismiss.i_should_be_able_to_interact_with_the_homepage_without_any_obstruction() ✘ And I should be able to interact with the homepage without any obstruction # stepdefinitions.Popup_Dismiss.i_should_be_able_to_interact_with_the_homepage_without_any_obstruction()
